name: CMG Home Loans Andrew W. Reid
description_short: CMG Seattle, led by VP Andrew W. Reid (NMLS #420400), is a mortgage lender specializing in home purchase and refinance loans nationwide since 1993.
description_long:
CMG Financial has operated as a mortgage lending firm since 1993, building a national presence in home financing. The Seattle branch, located at 255 S. King St Suite 800, is headed by Andrew W. Reid, who holds the title of Vice President - Strategic Partnerships and maintains NMLS individual ID #420400 with branch NMLS #2477186. The company positions itself as a full-service mortgage provider serving both prospective home buyers and existing homeowners.

CMG Seattle offers a diverse mortgage menu covering new purchase loans and refinance products. Loan officers serve dual roles as mortgage specialists and financial counselors, helping borrowers understand their options and make informed financing decisions. The company emphasizes its ability to structure loans for diverse borrower profiles and financial situations. Their service model includes secure document upload capabilities and direct contact with specialized loan officers.

The company differentiates itself through its stated mission: "Delivering the right loans for the right reasons in a way that exceeds all expectations" and its operational motto "Every Customer, Every Time. No Exceptions, No Excuses." This positioning suggests a commitment to accessibility and personalized service rather than automation-first processing. Andrew W. Reid's title as VP of Strategic Partnerships indicates the branch may emphasize relationship-based lending and partnership development.

Key limitations based on available information: the website provides minimal detail about specific loan products (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo status unclear), rate competitiveness cannot be assessed, and no customer reviews or complaints data is presented. The company's national scope means local Seattle market expertise is not independently verified. Borrowers should request detailed rate sheets, fee schedules, and product availability documentation before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Established 30-year track record (since 1993) in mortgage lending
Diverse mortgage menu explicitly designed to accommodate various borrower profiles
Loan officers function as financial counselors, not just transaction processors
Multiple contact methods: phone (425-890-0888, 855-732-4792), email, and secure document upload
Named officer (Andrew W. Reid, VP) with published NMLS credentials (#420400) and branch licensing (#2477186)
National lending platform enables nationwide loan origination, not limited to Washington state
Emphasis on accessibility with stated commitment to 'open more doors for home buyers'
cons: Website lacks specific product details (no mention of FHA, VA, jumbo, portfolio loans, or rate lock options)
No published rate sheets, fee schedules, or APR ranges available for comparison shopping
Limited local Seattle market information; national company may not emphasize regional expertise
No customer testimonials, reviews, or performance metrics published on website
Minimal transparency on processing timelines, approval rates, or loan terms specifics
best_for: Home buyers seeking new purchase mortgages with personalized financial counseling
Homeowners considering refinance options who prefer relationship-based lending over automated platforms
Borrowers with non-standard financial profiles who may benefit from diverse product menu
Clients valuing direct contact with named loan officers and strategic partnership approach
diagnosis: CMG Seattle is best suited for borrowers who prioritize personalized service and direct loan officer relationships over online-only lending platforms, particularly those with non-standard financial situations requiring customized mortgage solutions. The primary caveat is the absence of published rate, fee, and product transparency on their website—prospective borrowers must contact them directly to compare terms, and no independent verification of their market competitiveness is available from the public-facing website.
services: Secure document upload for loan applications
Diverse mortgage product menu customized to borrower profiles
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 255 S King St 800, Off 09-104, Seattle, WA 98104
